Profile

Award-winning creative director with 10+ years of experience leading brand transformations for Fortune 500 companies and high-growth startups. Known for blending strategic thinking with bold visual storytelling.

Experience

Creative Director — Brand Design — Nike Portland, OR → LA 2022-01 – Present
  • Led visual identity refresh for Nike Training Club, reaching 100M+ users
  • Directed 15-person creative team across brand, digital, and experiential
  • Produced campaign assets generating 2.8B social impressions
Senior Art Director — Spotify New York, NY 2019-03 – 2021-12
  • Designed Wrapped 2020 campaign — most-shared Spotify feature ever
  • Established motion design guidelines adopted across all product teams
Visual Designer — IDEO San Francisco, CA 2015-06 – 2019-02
  • Created brand identities for 12+ clients including Ford, Samsung, and Airbnb
  • Led design research workshops with C-suite stakeholders

Education

B.F.A., Graphic Design — Rhode Island School of Design 2011 – 2015
